name: What's average settlement for herniated disc work injury Utah?

mainEntity.name: What's average settlement for herniated disc work injury Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: **$40k-$100k+ depending on surgery, permanency, wages.** Varies by case facts[1]. **Key factors:** Impairment rating, lost income. **Practical guidance:** Wait for max medical, negotiate post-MMI. Lawyer maximizes. **Factors drive higher values.**
